creator: jan.grant@bristol.ac.uk
text:
arts-1.5.8_1,1              =  up-to-date with port
artswrapper-1.5.3           =  up-to-date with port

The box is a 64-bit SMP machine using

FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm: 64bit 2007061600/amd64)
Installed devices:
pcm0: <Intel 631x/632xESB High Definition Audio Controller> at memory 0xc3500000 irq 16 kld snd_hda [20071129_0050] [MPSAFE] (1p:1v/1r:1v channels duplex default)

The sound device itself appears to work correctly - eg, xmms playback is fine.

However, artsd-based sound form kde skips. Playback with noatun, the inbuilt sound player (the startup jingle) skips.

I've tried using the sound buffer at both extremes, to no affect. I've tried turning off the hardware sample rate autodetect, to no effect.

This is definitely a KDE/artsd issue, however - non-arts playback is fine.

Looking for other suggestions to chase this down.

How-To-Repeat: Play noise in KDE.
